title: acer campestre f. glabratum
intro: Acer campestre f. glabratum, also known as Smooth Field Maple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree species within the Acer campestre family, characterized by its smooth bark and leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its high tannin content. The health benefits of Acer campestre f. glabratum include relief from digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, making it a popular choice in traditional folk medicine. Acer campestre f. glabratum can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to make teas, salves, and ointments.
